action_set_definitions.name: get_precinct_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the metadata for a specific precinct to understand its configuration and requirements.

precinct_id.description: The unique identifier for the precinct (e.g., 'P-305').

action_set_definitions.name: list_ballot_batches
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all ballot batches associated with the precinct, including their current status and tally variances.

precinct_id.description: The unique identifier for the precinct.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_security_protocol_step
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a specific mandatory security sequence required by the precinct's DRE units. Must be called before auditing actions are permitted.

precinct_id.description: The unique identifier for the precinct.

step_number.description: The sequence number of the protocol step (e.g., 1, 2, 3).

protocol_code.description: The security code or operation name required for this step.

action_set_definitions.name: investigate_discrepancy
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed diagnostic information for a specific flagged ballot batch to determine the source of the variance.

batch_id.description: The unique identifier for the ballot batch.

action_set_definitions.name: update_batch_resolution
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a ballot batch status and records the resolution details. This tool adjusts the tally to match verified physical counts.

batch_id.description: The unique identifier for the ballot batch.

new_status.description: The target status for the batch.

adjustment_value.description: The numerical adjustment applied to resolve the variance.

action_set_definitions.name: get_reconciliation_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the aggregated reconciliation stats to verify if all discrepancies have been cleared.

precinct_id.description: The unique identifier for the precinct.

action_set_definitions.name: certify_precinct
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the audit and moves the precinct into a certified state. Only allowed if all discrepancies are resolved.

precinct_id.description: The unique identifier for the precinct.

state_description.precinct_metadata: General information about the precinct being audited.
state_description.ballot_batches: A list of ballot batches and their respective tallies from different sources.
state_description.audit_log: A chronological record of actions taken to resolve discrepancies.
state_description.reconciliation_summary: Aggregated stats for the entire resolution process.

audit_log: DRE Unit #9921 quarantined for discrepancy review.
Initial canvass report generated: B-901 shows 2-vote deficit; B-902 requires verification due to poll-worker log mismatch.
System Status: Security Layer 'Pending'. Integrity Checksums not yet validated for DRE #9921.
Chain of custody for VVPAT rolls verified by bipartisan board.
